versions.version_description: Not one of the 3 versions is correct. Link to the version tabbed: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eVli-tstM5E.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Espresso - Sabrina Carpenter (https://youtu be/51zjlMhdSTE?si=7jVt1rjK_mtW6h9B)
Standard Tuning, No Capo

** For the chorus, play either the Intro Riff (minus the slide at the end, adding the second 
riff where tabbed in the last chorus) or the chords; for the rest of the song, play the chords and 
second riff where tabbed

Chord Voicings:
[ch]Dm7[/ch] - x57565
[ch]Em7[/ch] - x79787

(Lines in tab seperate the bars)

[Intro Riff]

[tab]e|---------|-------------|---------|-------------|
B|-------8-|-----------5-|-------8-|-------------|
G|-9-----7-|-7---4-5-7---|-------7-|-7-----(4/7)-|
D|-9-----5-|-7-----------|-7-----5-|-7-----------|
A|-7-----5-|-5-----------|-7-----5-|-5-----------|
E|---------|-------------|-5-------|-------------|[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]                            [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Now he's thinkin' 'bout me every night, oh[/tab]

Is it that sweet? I guess so
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Say you can't sleep, baby, I know[/tab]

That's that me espresso
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                            [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Move it up, down, left, right, oh[/tab]

Switch it up like Nintendo
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Say you can't sleep, baby, I know[/tab]

That's that me espresso



[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I can't relate to desperation[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]
My give-a-fucks are on vacation[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
And I got this one boy and he won't stop calling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                     [ch]Dm7[/ch]
When they act this way, I know I got 'em[/tab]



[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
(Mm) Too bad your ex don't do it for ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]
(Mm) Walked in and dream-came-trued it for ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
(Mm) Soft skin and I perfumed it for ya[/tab]

A|-----------------------------------------|
E|-----------------------------------------|[/tab]
